summary: Add explicit timeouts to 7 external call sites that could hang indefinitely
details: pr-generator.js: converted 4 sync git calls (execFileSync/execSync) to async execFileAsync with 30s GIT_TIMEOUT_MS. dashboard-launcher/index.js: added 15s kill timer on browser-open spawn and 30s early crash detection on dashboard launch spawn. model-discovery.js: added AbortController with 30s COMMUNITY_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS to _fetchFromCommunity, matching the existing _fetchModels timeout pattern.
impact: Medium - prevents indefinite hangs on git commands, browser open, dashboard launch, and community fetch
